items.caption: An employee in a blue jumpsuit and safety harness climbing a step ladder that is not set up correctly. the ladder is positioned in such a way that it is not stable, and the employee is leaning to one side, which could be dangerous. the caption suggests that the employee should either set up the ladder properly or use an extension ladder to ensure safety. the background appears to be an industrial setting with metal structures and a fire extinguisher mounted on the wall.
